# Master Case Studies

> Free case competition frameworks, courses, and study resources for students. Operated by STERLING ORIGIN LIMITED.

## Entity relationship

- Brand / product: Master Case Studies
- Legal operator: STERLING ORIGIN LIMITED
- Website: https://www.mastercasestudies.com
- Contact: support@sterlingorigin.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/sterling-origin/

## About

Master Case Studies is an educational platform that helps university students prepare for business case competitions. It provides structured frameworks, practical courses, walkthroughs, and downloadable templates for market sizing, profitability analysis, M&A, and strategic problem-solving.

STERLING ORIGIN LIMITED is the company behind Master Case Studies.

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.mastercasestudies.com/
- Courses: https://www.mastercasestudies.com/courses.html
- Case Frameworks: https://www.mastercasestudies.com/resources.html
- Contact: https://www.mastercasestudies.com/contact.html

## Topics

Case competitions, business case studies, case frameworks, market sizing, profitability analysis, mergers and acquisitions, strategic thinking, university case comps, student resources, UK education.
